question_text: An electric motor receives 5000 J of electrical energy. It wastes 1500 J as heat and 200 J as sound. Calculate the useful mechanical work produced and the overall efficiency of the motor.
explanation: Useful energy output = Input − (Heat waste + Sound waste) = 5000 − (1500 + 200) = 3300 J. Efficiency = (3300 ÷ 5000) × 100 = 66%. This shows that two-thirds of the input energy is converted to useful work, while one-third is wasted.
